# Aiionwatha
> Aiionwatha helps Indigenous organizations, nonprofits, and SMBs secure funding with no upfront fees, structure projects, and build websites and digital resources that AI systems can understand and cite.

## Start Here
- [Home](https://aiionwatha.com/)
- [About Steven](https://aiionwatha.com/a-propos)
- [Services](https://aiionwatha.com/services)
- [FAQ](https://aiionwatha.com/faq)
- [CV](https://aiionwatha.com/cv)
- [Resume PDF](https://aiionwatha.com/documents/steven-germain-gros-louis-cv-2024.pdf)
- [Tools](https://aiionwatha.com/outils)
- [Site map](https://aiionwatha.com/plan-du-site)

## What Aiionwatha Does
- Funding strategy for grants, foundations, and philanthropy.
- Project structuring, budgets, dossiers, and follow-up with funders.
- Website strategy, content structure, and SEO/GEO-friendly pages.
- Digital support for AI adoption, documentation, and knowledge bases.
- Consulting for Indigenous organizations, OBNL, and SMBs.

## No-Risk Funding Support
- Free to start with an initial diagnostic.
- No upfront fees for funding support.
- Client risk is reduced because the work is structured before major spend decisions.
- The service is positioned to help people move from idea to funded project quickly.

## Website Support
- Strategic website planning for organizations that need a clear public presence.
- Website copy that explains who you help, what you solve, and why you are credible.
- Landing pages, service pages, and resource pages built for search and AI discovery.
- GEO-friendly structure with clear headings, concise explanations, and internal links.
